calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-09-2014 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-08-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mario G. Paolini Jr. for Debra Dolch.

The Court stated that before it was a petition for probate of will, that had received Mr. Paolini's supplemental declaration, and that it had no problem with the petition. Mr. Paolini stated that his declaration was pretty straight forward. The Court then granted the petition (subject to review of the revised order). No bond is required. Mr. Paolini provided the Court with a revised proposed order.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy Benton. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-31-2013 Continued To Aug-07-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
